en: Yeah, this is Sinclair. Copy. Go ahead. Sinclair, I'm confused. I thought your sister
said that Tina was mean. Oh, no, no. She's not mean. She's a villain. Like kill the puppies
for a coke kind of villain. Trust me. How long before the drugs kick in? All depends
on how much pie they eat. And how fast they eat it. What they had for lunch, when they
had lunch. Caffeine intake, alcohol intake. It's a lot of variables. Yeah, what could
go wrong, right? Aside from everything. Oh, you know, I'm so happy you girls made up.
We've really missed you, Erica, haven't we, dear? Missed this pie, that's for sure. Now,
ko: 우리는 정말 너를 그리워했어, 에리카, 그치, 사랑아?

en: it's something different this time. Sorry? Your pie. It's got a little something extra
ko: 네 파이에 오늘 밤 특별한 게 좀 들어갔어.

en: tonight. A little hint of... Nutmeg. Nutmeg! Of course. Really. Brilliant. Really, brilliant.
Tina, are you gonna try some? Oh, I wish. Looks super good. Just gotta watch those calories.
